components.name: account-list
components.purpose: Selectable list of accounts — identicon + label + balance rows with hover caret — used as the account chooser in Hub flows (inside AccountSelector).

components.name: account-ring
components.purpose: Ring of up to 6 identicons representing a logged-in multi-address account set — hexagonally arranged identicons for filled slots, faint hexagon placeholders for empty ones.

components.name: address-display
components.purpose: Displays a Nimiq (or Ethereum) address as a grid of monospace chunks — 9 four-char blocks in 3 columns for Nimiq format — optionally copyable.

components.name: address-input
components.purpose: A 3x3 block grid textarea for typing Nimiq addresses (optionally Ethereum addresses and domains), with live formatting into 4-char blocks, validation, and per-block focus coloring.

components.name: amount
components.purpose: Formats a crypto amount given in its smallest unit (luna, satoshi, ...) as a human-readable number with thin-space digit grouping, configurable decimals and a currency ticker.

components.name: amount-input
components.purpose: Large centered amount entry field that auto-fits its width and shrinks its font to the available space, with the currency ticker (NIM, BTC, ...) rendered beside the value.

components.name: amount-with-fee
components.purpose: Large centered amount entry field (auto-sizing AmountInput with currency ticker) plus a secondary line that shows either an 'Insufficient balance' error, an approximate fiat value and/or the network fee. Used in send-transaction flows.

components.name: buttons
components.purpose: Primary Nimiq buttons (.nq-button) from the nimiq-style CSS framework: pill-shaped gradient buttons in blue (default), light-blue, green, orange, red, gold, plus disabled and inverse states.

components.name: card
components.purpose: Standard Nimiq card container (.nq-card) with header, body and footer sections; the base layout block of @nimiq/style used for grouping content.

components.name: close-button
components.purpose: Circled X dismiss button used on modals and overlays. A .nq-button-s stripped of its pill background, showing the Nimiq close icon at 20% opacity (40% on hover/focus/active), with a round hover halo and enlarged hit area.

components.name: consensus-icon
components.purpose: Network consensus indicator shown by every Nimiq light-client app: a globe icon that reflects the consensus state — animated globe sprite while syncing, globe with checkmark when consensus is established (green when its parent is :hover/:focus/.active), globe with alert triangle in orange when connecting or stalled.

components.name: copyable
components.purpose: Wrapper that makes a click on its content copy it (or a provided text) to the clipboard, with a light-blue hover/focus tint and an animated 'Copied' tooltip as feedback.

components.name: fiat-amount
components.purpose: Displays a fiat amount with an optimized currency symbol (e.g. $1234.56 instead of USD 1234.56) and adaptive decimal precision: decimals are extended until the rounded display deviates from the true amount by at most maxRelativeDeviation.

components.name: identicon
components.purpose: Nimiq identicon avatar — a deterministic hexagonal avatar generated from a Nimiq address via @nimiq/iqons; shows a hexagon placeholder for missing/invalid addresses.

components.name: label-input
components.purpose: A self-sizing text input for naming things (addresses, accounts), styled as an nq-input whose width grows and shrinks with its content.

components.name: loading-spinner
components.purpose: Animated hexagon loading indicator: two dashed hexagon outlines (one at 40% opacity) whose dash offsets rotate around the hexagon in a 4s stepped ease cycle. Inherits its color via currentColor.

components.name: page-body
components.purpose: Scrollable content area of a card-style page. Pairs .page-body with the legacy .nq-card-body padding rules and flex-grows to fill the parent SmallPage, scrolling vertically when content overflows.

components.name: page-footer
components.purpose: Footer area of a Nimiq page/card (nq-card-footer). Flex column that pins action buttons at the bottom of a SmallPage and applies the standard nq-button margins.

components.name: page-header
components.purpose: Card header for Nimiq page flows: centered title, optional back arrow, optional step progress indicator. Used at the top of a SmallPage.

components.name: payment-info-line
components.purpose: Checkout header line: crypto amount (with optional fiat value + price-breakdown tooltip) on the left, an animated arrow runway, the recipient (shop logo or identicon + origin domain) and an expiry countdown timer on the right. Used at the top of the Nimiq Hub checkout.

components.name: qr-code
components.purpose: Nimiq QR code — renders arbitrary data (typically a nimiq: payment URI) as a rounded-module QR code on a canvas, filled by default with the Nimiq light-blue radial gradient (#265DD7 → #0582CA) on a transparent background.

components.name: select-bar
components.purpose: Segmented radio bar (pill-shaped) for choosing one of several ordered options, e.g. a transaction fee level. All options up to and including the selected one are tinted with the selected option's color; later options stay on the neutral highlight background.

components.name: slider-toggle
components.purpose: Pill-shaped radio toggle with a white 'active box' that slides under the selected option. Used in the Nimiq Wallet as a currency switcher (NIM/BTC) and for filter/sort selection.

components.name: small-page
components.purpose: Standard 420x564px white card container (SmallPage) that frames a page of content in Nimiq apps; pairs with PageHeader/PageBody/PageFooter.

components.name: status-alert
components.purpose: Status alert / callout block (note-info, tip-success, warning, caution-error, important) in the real Nimiq pattern: tinted background, 1.5px tonal outline, uppercase icon title and colored text. Used for status notices, warnings and error feedback.

components.name: status-screen
components.purpose: Full-card overlay status screen from the Nimiq Hub: loading (navy/light-blue gradient + hexagon spinner + status line), success (green gradient + animated checkmark), warning (orange + neutral face) and error (red + sad face) states, with optional action button/link. Covers the whole SmallPage while a request is processed and resolves into the iconic green checkmark end screen.

components.name: timer
components.purpose: Circular countdown timer (Hub checkout 'offer expires' indicator): a light-blue arc shrinking clockwise as time runs out, a faint filler arc in the gap, and the remaining time (simplified to the largest fitting unit) in the center. Turns orange when >= 75% of the time has elapsed.

components.name: toast-notification
components.purpose: Bottom-fixed toast notification in Nimiq wallet style: small dark gradient card with icon, bold status line and dimmed sub-line. Color states: info/in-progress (blue + hexagon spinner), success (green + checkmark), error (orange + alert triangle), warning/expired (gold + stopwatch). Used in the wallet for swap progress and persistent status toasts.

components.name: tooltip
components.purpose: Hover/focus/click tooltip with a positioned arrow box. Wraps a trigger element (icon by default) and shows a dark Nimiq-blue gradient box with an arrow, positioned via a preferred '[primary] [secondary]' position (e.g. 'top right'), optionally constrained to a container.
